options.text: Gridwolf is a passive ICS/OT security platform: network topology discovery from PCAPs, CVE intelligence, and MITRE ATT&CK for ICS mapping. This template deploys a single VM with Docker, pulls the official Gridwolf images, and creates a persistent data disk.

elements.name: vmSize
elements.label: VM size
elements.toolTip: D2s_v3 is the standard evaluation size. Use F4s_v2 or D4s_v3 for heavy PCAP workloads.

toolTip.authenticationType: SSH public key is strongly recommended. Passwords may be rejected by Azure policy on some subscriptions.
toolTip.sshPublicKey: Paste your SSH public key (~/.ssh/id_rsa.pub or ~/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub).

constraints.customValidationMessage: Password must be at least 12 characters.

elements.name: dataDiskSizeGB
elements.label: Data disk size (GB)
elements.toolTip: Persistent disk for PCAPs, database, and reports. Separate from the OS disk and retained across VM replacements.

elements.name: gridwolfVersion
elements.label: Gridwolf version
elements.toolTip: Docker Hub tag. Use a pinned semver (e.g. 1.1.0) for production, or 'latest' for eval.

constraints.validationMessage: Only alphanumeric, dot, underscore, and dash allowed.

elements.name: dockerHubUsername
elements.label: Docker Hub namespace
elements.toolTip: Docker Hub org/user that owns the backend and frontend images. Only change this if you've forked Gridwolf into your own registry.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid Docker Hub namespace (lowercase alphanumeric, 2-64 chars).
